title: Edward and Caroline
actors: Daniel Gélin, Anne Vernon, Elina Labourdette
plot: Edouard is a pianist, married with Caroline. This evening, they are invited to Claude's. Claude is the snobbish uncle of Caroline, his son Alain (as snobbish as his father) is in love with Caroline. They spite Edouard a little bec...
